> scan
I2C scan:
  Found device at 0x48
  Found device at 0x50
  Found device at 0x7E

> autodetect

Auto-detect roles (read-only)
  No PWR_EN, HSA, or VIN_BULK state changes are performed.
Auto-detect roles:
  0x48  PMIC                   confidence=high  reason=PMIC ID regs 0x3C/0x3D returned 0x0D 0x85
  0x50  SPD_HUB                confidence=high  reason=SPD offset 0x0000 read starts 30 10 12 02
  0x7E  RESERVED               confidence=medium  reason=I3C reserved/broadcast style address; no actions assigned


> reg 0x48 0x00 16
REG: addr 0x48 reg 0x00 len 16
00: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

> pmicid 0x48
PMICID: reading ID bytes from 0x48 regs 0x3C/0x3D...
PMICID raw: 0x0D 0x85
PMICID JEP106-ish: bank/cont=13  code=0x05
